Article.ArticleTitle: Effect of eccentric training at different muscle lengths on the gastrocnemius medialis fascicle behaviour during single and multi-joint tasks.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Nantes Université, Motricité-Interactions-Performance, MIP, UR 4334, Nantes, 44000, France.
